description: Outstanding contract index for durable development contracts

contracts.title: Harness Migration Phase 1: Additive Files
contracts.summary: Copy 27 in-scope template-only files, append 21 missing .gitignore patterns, and defer MANIFEST.yaml to Phase 4. Additive only, no existing files modified.

contracts.title: Harness Migration Phase 2: Wiring and Indexes
contracts.summary: Wire 5 new agents and 6 new commands into AGENTS.md, agent/command INDEX.md files, and pipeline.yaml ingest/housekeeping stages.

contracts.title: Harness Migration Phase 3: Agent Spec Cherry-Picks
contracts.summary: Cherry-pick lane activation policy, NON-GOALS guardrails, and other template v7 agent-spec improvements while preserving dj-tools customizations.

contracts.title: Harness Migration Phase 4: Schema and Pipeline Reconciliation
contracts.summary: Migrate MANIFEST.yaml to template versioning schema, reconcile pipeline.py with template improvements, and optionally adopt active/archive run layout. Highest risk phase.

contracts.title: Top Workspace Layout And Table Polish
contracts.summary: Increase anchor height, unify search and filters, clean up table controls, fix browse header alignment, and tighten Explorer canvas spacing.

contracts.title: Track Drag Preview Pointer Alignment
contracts.summary: Fix the virtualized track-row drag overlay so it stays anchored to the pointer without regressing drag performance or drop behavior.

contracts.title: Set Building Expansion
contracts.summary: Replace the client-local set builder with server-persisted sets, pool, tracklist, and explorer graph plus the supporting schema and APIs.

contracts.title: Set Workspace Security Hardening
contracts.summary: Tighten set-workspace CORS exposure and bound explorer edge-score request size before broader rollout.
